name: flow-marketplace-automation
description: Playwright UI and API automation framework for Flow Marketplace web application (JavaScript, POM architecture).

scripts.test:api: npx playwright test tests/api; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:auth: npx playwright test tests/UI/auth; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:marketplace: npx playwright test tests/UI/marketplace; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:migration: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:validate: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration/validate.spec.js; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:shopify: npx playwright test tests/UI/shopify tests/UI/auth/shopify.setup.spec.js; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:probes: npx playwright test tests/UI/probes; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:smoke: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration/e2e-smoke/ --workers=2; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:e2e-full:dry: DRY_RUN=1 npx playwright test --config tests/UI/migration/e2e-full/playwright.config.js; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:e2e-full:p1:dry: DRY_RUN=1 npx playwright test --config tests/UI/migration/e2e-full/playwright.config.js --grep "phase:1"; node utils/dashboard.js
scripts.test:e2e-single: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration/e2e_migration.spec.js --timeout=300000 --workers=1 --retries=0; node utils/dashboard.js
